name: optiverse-agentic-design
description: Agent skill for designing and verifying Optiverse optical layouts through the optiverse-agent CLI.

interface.shortDescription: Design and verify Optiverse optical layouts.
interface.longDescription: A workflow skill that teaches an agent to use the composable optiverse-agent CLI for catalog inspection, layout compilation, validation, ray tracing, scoring, rendering, iteration, and GUI hand-off.
defaultPrompt: Design a HWP/PBS splitter in Optiverse.
Trace and score this optical layout.
Render this Optiverse scene and open the GUI.
